arts.ttl: The tactical battle facing Celtic as Hibernian revival comes up against ultimate test
arts.sum: Analyst Alan Morrison takes a close look at what Celtic can expect when Hibernian come calling in Sunday's big Scottish Cup clash at Celtic Park.

arts.ttl: Celtic supporter WINS £50k as Manchester City and Haaland beaten by Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: X user Julian has bounced back after his 3-0 Old Firm humiliation in January

arts.ttl: Annoyed Hugh Keevins makes incredible U-turn and admits Celtic star played 'like Kylian Mbappe'
arts.sum: Well, he went as far as saying on Clyde 1 Superscoreboard that the winger played like Real Madrid superstar Kylian Mbappe in Paisley last weekend. Hugh Keevins: “He came on for half an hour and looked like Kylian Mbappe, never mind Yang!

arts.ttl: Forgetful Phil stretches reality with a bonkers Rangers claim as perfect next Celtic striker won't cost a penny
arts.sum: Hugh Keevins has so many big opinions and it becomes impossible to fit them all into a Sunday

arts.ttl: The two Celtic stars who present Hibs defender Lewis Miller with 'favourite' challenge
arts.sum: Hibs star Lewis Miller is excited to face Celtic’s Daizen Maeda and Jota For Miller he coped well that day, it has to be said, and he did so against two of the best stars in the country in the form of player of the year candidate Daizen Maeda and Jota.

arts.ttl: Listen: Off the Ball with guests Judith Ralston & Grado
arts.sum: The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers to leave Celtic star feeling hard done by in Hibs Scottish Cup tie
arts.sum: So here at 67 Hail Hail we’ve attempted to predict what Rodgers might be thinking as he selects the XI stars he feels can knock Hibs out and avenge the recent 2-1 defeat at Easter Road. Celtic predicted XI vs Hibs: SCHMEICHEL, JOHNSTON, CCV, TRUSTY, SCHLUPP, MCGREGOR, MCCOWAN, ENGELS, MAEDA, KUHN, IDAH.

arts.ttl: Former referees eviscerate 'total mess' Celtic VAR scandal after listening to audio
arts.sum: Rodgers was fuming after the game and accused Muir of guesswork because the camera angles available lacked conclusive evidence to prove the ball was fully over the byline. Des Roache and Steve Conroy slam VAR audio of disallowed Celtic goal

arts.ttl: What we learned from Celtic training before Hibs Scottish Cup clash as two injury worries return
arts.sum: And in the build-up to the cup quarter-final, the Celtic social media team posted their routine training footage from Lennoxtown to show what has been going on with the players. Trusty suffered a head knock which left him bloodied and, like with McGregor, Rodgers did not want to take any chances and he was replaced.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel enlightens baffled Gary Neville about how Celtic play ‘tactical chess’
arts.sum: Neville showed Kasper and the panel a clip of Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez standing with the ball at his feet with no pressure from the opposition. Kasper Schmeichel explains Celtic ‘tactical chess’ to Gary Neville
